output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY1-131","author":"MarketWatchUK","text":"Just got an email from 'TicketMaster Support' claiming my booking for the upcoming gig was cancelled due to a system error. They've sent me a link to 'reschedule' via a strange website and ask for my card details to confirm the new date. Is this legit or should I be worried? 🎟️🔒 #GigAlert","category":"Fraud","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"The post describes a plausible phishing attempt involving impersonation of a ticket seller and a request for payment details, requiring specialist investigation to verify the sender's authenticity.","day":1,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false}]}`
